calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Stipulation
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, NA'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TEMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT.

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to enter judgment pursuant to the parties' stipulation is granted. Plaintiff shows entitlement to $255.31 in principal plus costs of $583.61. Plaintiff shall submit a proposed order granting the motion and a proposed judgment. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
